name: chr1_1q44_subtelomeric_SDs
description: 1q44 subtelomeric segmental-duplication cluster covering the terminal ~3 Mb of 1q. Site of the 1q44 microdeletion syndrome (AKT3, ZBTB18, HNRNPU) with breakpoints at flanking SDs shared with other human subtelomeres.

architecture.internal_structure: Subtelomeric SDs of 10-100 kb at 90-98% identity shared with other chromosome ends; unique gene content includes AKT3, ZBTB18, HNRNPU, OR2-family pseudogenes.
